calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
ROSS MADDEN, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Robert K. Simmons
ARTHUR CHAMBERS, Esq. on behalf of defendant Ronald D. Martinez

Parties reached a settlement as follows: Stipulation for entry of judgment for possession of premises located at 453 Linden St., San Francisco, CA. Judgment will not be entered if terms of the stipulation are complied with. Stay until midnight on June 12, 2005. Premises to be room clean and free of debris. Plaintiff Robert K. Simmons is entitled to costs. Plaintiff waives prior rent. If terms of the stipulation are complied with, plaintiff will dismiss the case with prejudice.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Lok; Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 (206)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2005 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ross McLauran Madden, Esq., 415-567-1212, for opposing party/plaintiff Robert Simmons

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT RONALD MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Overruled with 5 days leave to amend. Order signed. 301/JLW/SL) Christina T. Paxton, CSR# 1558

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ross McLauran Madden, Esq., 415-567-1212, for opposing party/plaintiff Robert Simmons

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RONALD MARTINEZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Denied. Order signed. (301/JLW/SL) Christina T. Paxton, CSR# 1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANT RONALD MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled with 5 days leave to answer. Motion to strike is off calendar as moot. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/KMCCA/CT) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR: 6840
